description: Propose Phase 0 step P0.2: migrate data and state artifacts out of the repository into gs://barber-agent-state/ so that the repository remains the canonical source for code only. Scope is limited to identifying and migrating data/state artifacts and preserving the repo=code, GCS=data contract. Out of scope: Policy Director, Report Bus upgrade, Proof Ledger implementation, Phase 1 components, and any redesign beyond P0.2 migration contour.
